headlines: Coinbase wins conditional OCC trust-charter approval
Morgan Stanley files Amendment No.4 as Bitcoin ETF launch nears
Circle unveils cirBTC ‚Äî wrapped Bitcoin with real-time onchain reserves
Volatility Shares launches 2x leveraged ETFs for ADA, XLM and LINK

articles.title: Coinbase wins conditional OCC approval for national trust charter
articles.summary: Coinbase said it has received conditional approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to form a federally chartered national trust company, a key step toward offering federal custody and new products like stablecoins and tokenized securities. ([news.bloomberglaw.com](https://news.bloomberglaw.com/crypto/coinbase-says-it-wins-conditional-us-approval-for-trust-charter?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Morgan Stanley files Amendment No.4 ‚Äî signals Bitcoin ETF launch is near
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed Amendment No.4 to its S-1 for the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust, stepping the proposed spot-BTC ETF toward listing on NYSE Arca under ticker MSBT and showing final launch details are being set. ([news.bitcoin.com](https://news.bitcoin.com/morgan-stanley-signals-bitcoin-etf-near-launch-with-amendment-4-update//?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Circle launches cirBTC ‚Äî wrapped Bitcoin with onchain, real-time reserve checks
articles.summary: Circle announced cirBTC, a 1:1 wrapped bitcoin token built for institutions that promises real-time onchain reserve verification and multichain support (Ethereum and Arc first). It aims to give a transparent alternative to existing wrapped‚ÄëBTC options. ([news.bitcoin.com](https://news.bitcoin.com/circle-reveals-wrapped-bitcoin-product-with-real-time-onchain-reserve-verification//?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Volatility Shares launches 2x leveraged ETFs for Cardano, Stellar and Chainlink
articles.summary: ETF issuer Volatility Shares rolled out new 2x leveraged crypto ETFs tied to ADA (Cardano), XLM (Stellar) and LINK (Chainlink), giving traders amplified daily exposure to those altcoins. These products raise risk and trading volume for mid‚Äëcap tokens. ([cryptomist.io](https://www.cryptomist.io/articles/three-altcoins-now-have-leveraged-crypto-etfs?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Weekly stablecoin recap: USDC saw large outflows in latest week
articles.summary: Stablecoin Beat‚Äôs weekly recap shows notable movements in reserves and flows ‚Äî including a large USDC outflow in the Mar 30‚ÄìApr 5 window ‚Äî underlining shifting liquidity between dollar stablecoins and trading venues. ([stablecoinbeat.com](https://stablecoinbeat.com/weekly/stablecoin-market-recap-march-30-5-2026/?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Ethereum gains after spot-ETF inflows and lower exchange reserves
articles.summary: Ether ticked higher on April 2 as spot‚ÄëETH ETFs recorded fresh inflows and on‚Äëexchange ETH reserves fell, suggesting institutional demand and lower sell pressure may be supporting price. ([ad-hoc-news.de](https://www.ad-hoc-news.de/boerse/news/ueberblick/ether-eth-gains-1-8-percent-to-2-140-amid-spot-etf-inflows-and-low/69056044?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Crypto market note: Bitcoin tests $66k support as ETF flows swing
articles.summary: Market reports show Bitcoin testing key support near $66k amid volatile ETF flows and risk‚Äëoff sentiment; daily ETF flows and exchange movement are being watched closely by traders and institutions. ([mexc.com](https://www.mexc.com/news/999824?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Daily outflow flagged at BlackRock‚Äôs IBIT on April 2
articles.summary: Data feeds flagged a sizable one‚Äëday outflow from BlackRock‚Äôs iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) on April 2, a reminder that top ETF issuers still see large, fast flows that move prices. ([blockchain.news](https://blockchain.news/flashnews/blackrock-bitcoin-etf-sees-significant-daily-outflow?utm_source=openai))
